## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives for Ramp and GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing positive results: 29 articles published, 128 clicks, 22K+ impressions](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Workflow adjustments needed due to upcoming absences and onsite meetings](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New backlink acquisition tool developed by GrowthX for targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Vertical-specific content (e.g., dentists) showing promising early results](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [29 articles published and indexed, generating 128 clicks and 22K+ impressions](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Proposed workflow: Content strategy sent Monday, reviewed by Tuesday, published Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Combining related topics (e.g., top-down/bottom-up budgeting) into larger articles to test Google's preferences](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Content refreshes in progress, with Daniel assisting in improving the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/PxK_SyJyx1pNXpkvaxxGKNTm1xhAGbgk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Upcoming Schedule Adjustments
